headline: Assessing Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation As Strait Of Hormuz Tensions Lift Volatility Index
summary: Heightened tension around the Strait of Hormuz cease-fire pushed the CBOE Volatility Index above 19.5, and that kind of move puts Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) firmly on investors’ radar. See our latest analysis for Cboe Global Markets. With the VIX jump putting volatility products in focus, Cboe Global Markets' recent 7.2% 1 month share price return and 22.7% year to date share price return sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 43.6%. This points to momentum that has been building...

headline: Amplify ETFs Launches Two Fixed Income Covered Call ETFs for Targeted Annualized Income
summary: Introducing the Amplify LQD Investment Grade 12% Target Income ETF (LQDM) & Amplify HYG High Yield 10% Target Income ETF (HYGM)CHICAGO, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Amplify ETFs, a leading provider of breakthrough ETF solutions, announces the launch of two new fixed income ETFs: the Amplify LQD Investment Grade 12% Target Income ETF (CBOE: LQDM) and the Amplify HYG High Yield 10% Target Income ETF (CBOE: HYGM). LQDM and HYGM are designed to deliver high targeted income and attractive total

headline: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES INCREASED PROPOSAL TO ACQUIRE EMERITA RESOURCES CORP.
summary: Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) ("Denarius Metals" or the "Company") announced today that it is increasing its previous proposal to acquire all of the issued and outstanding common shares of Emerita Resources Corp. ("Emerita") to CA$0.45 per Emerita share under an all-share transaction, representing an approximate 73% premium to Emerita's closing share price on the TSX Venture Exchange on April 10, 2026 (the "Proposal"). Denarius Metals is ready to engage promptly with Emeri

raw.headline: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES INCREASED PROPOSAL TO ACQUIRE EMERITA RESOURCES CORP.
raw.summary: Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) ("Denarius Metals" or the "Company") announced today that it is increasing its previous proposal to acquire all of the issued and outstanding common shares of Emerita Resources Corp. ("Emerita") to CA$0.45 per Emerita share under an all-share transaction, representing an approximate 73% premium to Emerita's closing share price on the TSX Venture Exchange on April 10, 2026 (the "Proposal"). Denarius Metals is ready to engage promptly with Emeri
